title: Google发布DiffusionGemma：4倍速文本生成
full_text:
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
🚨 AI News | TestingCatalog
@testingcatalog
Google released DiffusionGemma, a new open model with up to 4x faster output!
> Instead of predicting word-by-word, it generates entire blocks of text simultaneously. This lets the model self-correct and format complex markdown in real time.
Same performance as Gemma 4 is a big dea ased on the model previewed last year.
Google Gemma
@googlegemma
9h
Meet DiffusionGemma!
An experimental open model that explores a fast approach to text generation, released under an Apache 2.0 license.
Moving beyond sequential, token-by-token processes to generate entire blocks of text simultaneously. Here’s what’s new with DiffusionGemma: 👇
00:00
4:43 PM · Jun 10, 2026 14K Views

visible_range: 抓取时页面可见正文 / 讨论文本

discovery_record.discovery_summary: Google发布了实验性开源模型DiffusionGemma，采用Apache 2.0许可。该模型不再逐token预测，而是同时生成整块文本，速度提升高达4倍。它能在生成过程中自我纠正，并实时格式化复杂Markdown。性能与Gemma 4相当。

key_excerpts.text: Google发布了实验性开源模型DiffusionGemma，采用Apache 2.0许可。该模型不再逐token预测，而是同时生成整块文本，速度提升高达4倍。它能在生成过程中自我纠正，并实时格式化复杂Markdown。性能与Gemma 4相当。
Post Log in Sign up Post 🚨 AI News | TestingCatalog @testingcatalog Google released DiffusionGemma, a new open model with up to 4x faster output!
> Instead of predicting word-by-word, it generates entire blocks of text simultaneously.
This lets the model self-correct and format complex markdown in real time.
Same performance as Gemma 4 is a big dea ased on the model previewed last year.
